item.title: Presentations with reveal.js
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya / @rmarianoa
item.description:
OlôÙd-ôÙfasôÙhioôÙned PPôÙT's preôÙsenôÙtaôÙtions are from the 90's, and leôÙt's faôÙce it, we are in the aôÙge of the web broôÙwôÙseôÙr. So, the last tiôÙme I had to gaôÙve a taôÙlk, I deôÙciôÙded to use a beôÙtter teôÙchôÙniôÙcal suôÙpporôÙt.

After a quiôÙck searôÙch for alôÙterôÙnaôÙtiôÙveôÙs, I found many opôÙtionôÙs, inôÙcluôÙdinôÙg weôÙll-kôÙnoôÙwn liôÙbraôÙrieôÙs, unôÙtil I fiôÙnaôÙlly deôÙciôÙded for reôÙveaôÙl.ôÙjs.

It is wriôÙtten in JaôÙvaSôÙcript wiôÙth good CSS theôÙmeôÙs, and it does not reôÙquiôÙre exôÙpert knoôÙwôÙleôÙdge on thoôÙse teôÙchôÙnoôÙloôÙgieôÙs. In orôÙder to play the preôÙsenôÙtaôÙtioôÙn, you launôÙch an HTôÙML fiôÙle from a web broôÙwôÙser or ôÙyou can alôÙso run it wiôÙth a staôÙtic serôÙveôÙr.

AdôÙvanôÙtaôÙges:

  • VeôÙrôÙôÙsion coôÙnôÙôÙtroôÙôÙôÙl: GiôÙôÙven the fact that your preôÙsenôÙôÙtaôÙôÙtion is maôÙôÙde from souôÙrôÙôÙce coôÙôÙôÙde, it is poôÙôÙsôÙôÙsiôÙôÙble ôÙôÙto traôÙôÙck chanôÙôÙges by using giôÙôÙt.

  • A beôÙôÙôÙtter croôÙôÙss-ôÙôÙplaôÙôÙtform suôÙôÙppoôÙrôÙôÙt: it does not reôÙôÙly on a paôÙrôÙôÙtiôÙôÙcuôÙôÙlar soôÙôÙôÙftwaôÙôÙre in a paôÙrôÙôÙtiôÙôÙcuôÙôÙlar veôÙrôÙôÙsion to be preôÙsent (web broôÙôÙwôÙôÙsers are ubiôÙôÙquiôÙôÙtous noôÙôÙwaôÙôÙdaôÙôÙys).

  • CoôÙmôÙôÙpaôÙôÙtiôÙôÙbiôÙôÙliôÙôÙty: WYôÙôÙSIWôÙôÙYG.

  • Able to host your preôÙsenôÙôÙtaôÙôÙtion in the cloud and acôÙôÙceôÙss it from anôÙôÙywheôÙôÙre.

ReaôÙsons to use it / niôÙce things about it:

  • We are in 2014

  • SuôÙôÙppoôÙrôÙôÙts MaôÙôÙrkôÙôÙdoôÙôÙwn lanôÙôÙguaôÙôÙge

To be cleaôÙr: I am not saôÙying that this is a beôÙtter alôÙterôÙnaôÙtiôÙve beôÙcauôÙse is newer of moôÙderôÙn, ôÙbut beôÙcauôÙse of the adôÙvanôÙtaôÙges lisôÙteôÙd. In other worôÙdôÙs, if we count wiôÙth deôÙveôÙloôÙped toolôÙs at our disôÙpoôÙsal, it would be a good idea to use theôÙm.

HeôÙre are soôÙme simôÙple and baôÙsic examôÙples of preôÙsenôÙtaôÙtions I am woôÙrking on. (ôÙDISôÙCLAIôÙMEôÙR: they miôÙght be in diôÙffeôÙrent lanôÙguaôÙges, and the paôÙge is in proôÙgress).

item.title: Starting a gnome-shell extension
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
SinôÙce I moôÙved from UbunôÙtu to FeôÙdoôÙra earôÙly this yeaôÙr, I chanôÙged my deskôÙtoôÙp enôÙviôÙronôÙment from uniôÙty to GnoôÙme SheôÙll.

I must say it is a great exôÙpeôÙrienôÙce. At the beôÙginôÙning I was thiôÙnking on what was beôÙtter comôÙpaôÙred to uniôÙty (beôÙcauôÙse I did not like UniôÙty). ReôÙgarôÙding this ôÙcomôÙpaôÙriôÙson I found a moôÙre staôÙble and usaôÙble winôÙdow maôÙnaôÙgeôÙr. I stiôÙll preôÙfer soôÙmeôÙthinôÙg ôÙsimôÙpler perhapôÙs, but it woôÙrks good and it is niôÙce.

Just out of cuôÙrioôÙsiôÙty, one day I started maôÙnaôÙging soôÙme exôÙtenôÙsionôÙs. Oh, by the waôÙy, ôÙyou wiôÙll proôÙbaôÙbly be insôÙtaôÙlling soôÙme exôÙtenôÙsions for GnoôÙme sheôÙll, soôÙme of them are uôÙseôÙful and soôÙme others make it moôÙre usaôÙble. That droôÙve me to the exôÙtenôÙsions deôÙveôÙloôÙper API, whiôÙch turôÙned out to be quiôÙte simôÙple and inôÙteôÙresôÙtinôÙg.

HaôÙving plaôÙyed a liôÙttle biôÙt, I deôÙciôÙded to coôÙde a (veôÙrôÙy) simôÙple exôÙtenôÙsion that does just one ôÙsinôÙgle thinôÙg. I caôÙlled it "simôÙple-ôÙnaôÙme" and it is avaiôÙlaôÙble at: SimôÙple-ôÙNaôÙme-ExôÙtenôÙsion

It reôÙmemôÙbers soôÙme liôÙttle deôÙtail I was misôÙsing from soôÙme preôÙvious winôÙdow maôÙnaôÙgers that I haôÙve uôÙsôÙed along the yearôÙs, whiôÙch is to disôÙplay the userôÙnaôÙme of the cuôÙrrenôÙtly loôÙggeôÙd-in useôÙr.

I must say thaôÙt, I coôÙde it just for the sake of learôÙning and exôÙpeôÙriôÙmenôÙting wiôÙth and API and a bit of JaôÙvaSôÙcripôÙt. In addiôÙtion I found veôÙry inôÙteôÙresôÙting to see fronôÙt-end reôÙlated teôÙchôÙnoôÙloôÙgies like JaôÙvaSôÙcript or CSS uôÙsôÙed in the deskôÙtop enôÙviôÙronôÙment (not that is soôÙmeôÙthing new, but stiôÙll funnôÙy).

To sum up, I wanted to hiôÙghôÙliôÙght that is inôÙteôÙresôÙting to learn new teôÙchôÙnoôÙloôÙgieôÙs, even wiôÙth liôÙttle anôÙd ôÙsimôÙple steps like a new API, liôÙbraôÙrôÙy, etc. It is not for the teôÙchôÙnoôÙloôÙgy itselôÙf, but for the sake of ôÙlearôÙning :)
